rationale: No qualitative change affecting Poland directly; Iran deal uncertainty continues to weigh on energy prices indirectly, but no new escalation.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran deal keeps oil/gas price outlook unstable, indirectly affecting Polish energy costs and inflation. No resolution yet.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US AI policy shift has minimal direct impact on Polish daily life; continuation of background tech-policy noise with no immediate effect on Poland.

top_events.title: Thousands rally in Rome for rival pro- and anti-migration marches
top_events.summary: Migration debate intensifying in Italy signals ongoing EU-wide political pressure on migration policy, a topic Poland monitors closely but no direct impact yet.
